scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude boilerplate-react --topological-dev run lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude boilerplate-react --topological-dev run typecheck
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude boilerplate-react --topological-dev run test
scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude boilerplate-react --topological-dev run build
